tests.description: Hop limit reached: fallback mode runs once more with handoff tool stripped. Pinned to the deterministic LLM provider (even on the post-merge real-LLM CI run) because this test verifies router control flow — hop counting, the maxHops boundary, and the forced-answer fallback that strips the handoff tool — none of which a real LLM would reliably reproduce turn-for-turn. The mock sequence ping-pongs handoffs research↔code to burn the hop budget, then the final 'fallback answer' is only emitted by the stripped-tool fallback call.
